question_text:
Find the missing number in the following series:

1    3    7    15    31    ?    127

• 1 × 2 + 1 = 3
• 3 × 2 + 1 = 7
• 7 × 2 + 1 = 15
• 15 × 2 + 1 = 31

question_text:
Find the missing number in the following series:

2    5    14    41    ?    365    1094
solution:
• The pattern is: multiply by 3, then subtract 1
• 2 × 3 - 1 = 5
• 5 × 3 - 1 = 14
• 14 × 3 - 1 = 41
• 41 × 3 - 1 = 122
• 122 × 3 - 1 = 365
• 365 × 3 - 1 = 1094
• Therefore, the answer is B because 41 × 3 - 1 = 122
